TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Pyahaw, title = Pyahaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pyahaw} }

S.FORM: alang Pyahaw ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Nango go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 389 buwan, 1,227 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 1,133 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 94 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 86%, Amis 2%, Truku 1%, Paywan 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Pyahaw hya' ga K'babaw. tay 'llaw na Pyahaw hya' ga Kngungu. tay 'zil na Pyahaw hya' ga Ryohen. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Pyahaw ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Nango go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 389 buwan, 1,227 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 1,133 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 94 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 86%, Amis 2%, Truku 1%, Paywan 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Pyahaw hya' ga K'babaw. tay 'llaw na Pyahaw hya' ga Kngungu. tay 'zil na Pyahaw hya' ga Ryohen. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč pjańßaw …£a nija mki s~…ēku …£iraŇč keŇč atu naŇčo …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, amis~…ē *%, truku *%, pajwan *%, ő≤unun *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkjańßu Ē na pjańßaw ńßja Ē …£a k Ēő≤aő≤aw. taj Ēllaw na pjańßaw ńßja Ē …£a kŇčuŇču. taj Ēzil na pjańßaw ńßja Ē …£a rjońßen. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
